items.title: Server-side submission validation
items.notes: BUG-001 — validate-answers.ts + submissions router.

items.title: Rate limit public endpoints
items.notes: SEC-001, SEC-002 — in-memory rate-limit.ts on submit + track.

items.title: Transactional submission + lead insert
items.notes: BUG-002 — db.transaction in submissions router.

items.title: Everest design system + UI revamp
items.notes: Mauve/everest-green/gold tokens, Panel/PageHeader/EmptyState, admin sidebar, public form hero.

items.title: Visual form builder
items.notes: Replace JSON editor with drag-and-drop field blocks (@dnd-kit).

items.title: Embeddable forms
items.notes: iframe / script embed for landing pages.

items.title: CRM & Slack webhooks on new lead
items.notes: IPO cut: Slack/email (or Inngest) when a lead is created. Later: HubSpot/Notion/Sheets sync. See docs/admin-leads-roadmap.md § Tier 3.

items.title: Conditional field logic
items.notes: Show/skip fields based on prior answers.

items.title: Analytics charts
items.notes: Funnel visualization and drop-off heatmap in admin.

items.title: Admin user provisioning
items.notes: CLI or internal flow to invite Everest staff (sign-up disabled).

items.title: Client-side auth redirect guard
items.notes: Fixed: sign-out + router.invalidate() to /login; admin layout useEffect watches session.

items.title: Checkbox field renders as text input
items.notes: FieldInput has no checkbox branch; users must type 'true'/'false'.

items.title: field_answered fires per keystroke
items.notes: Should fire on blur/debounce; inflates drop-off, hammers DB, risks rate-limit rejections.

items.title: form_started fires on mount instead of interaction
items.notes: Sent together with form_viewed on mount → starts≈views, completion rate meaningless.

items.title: Versioned form definitions / submission snapshot
items.notes: Old submissions become unreadable after edits; store definition version with submission.

items.title: Editor: save feedback, error surfacing, unsaved-changes guard
items.notes: No toast on save success, mutation errors not surfaced, no beforeUnload guard.

items.title: Slug change breaks live links
items.notes: form_slug_redirects + resolvePublishedFormBySlug; TTL via SLUG_REDIRECT_TTL_DAYS (default 90, 0=permanent).

items.title: Duplicate submission protection
items.notes: No uniqueness on (formId, sessionId); back-button or retry creates dupes.

items.title: Spam protection (honeypot / captcha)
items.notes: Rate limit alone won't stop bots filling lead pipelines.

items.title: Partial submissions capture
items.notes: Track field events but discard answers on abandon; high-value for lead gen / warm recovery queue. See docs/admin-leads-roadmap.md § Tier 4.

items.title: Submission detail view + CSV export
items.notes: Done for form submissions. Lead-level CSV is tracked separately as lead-csv-export.

items.title: Lead detail view + notes + full answers
items.notes: Done 2026-07-14 — LeadDetailPanel with answers, notes (insights.notes), status/assignee, click-to-contact. See docs/admin-leads-roadmap.md.

items.title: Lead CSV / Excel export
items.notes: Done 2026-07-14 — orpc.leads.exportCsv respects list filters; Admin Export CSV button.

items.title: Lead list: server filters, search, sort, pagination
items.notes: Done 2026-07-14 — list returns {items,total,page,pageSize,hasMore}; filters: status, assignee, q, sort, agedOnly.

items.title: Surface IPO classification fields in leads UI
items.notes: Done 2026-07-14 — profil + compte titres badges/columns + insights panels.

items.title: My leads / unassigned work queue + aging
items.notes: Done 2026-07-14 — unassigned filter, SLA file (new>24h / contacted>72h), stat cards + badges. Agent-scoped 'my leads' still needs RBAC (lead-rbac).

items.title: Bulk assign / status / export
items.notes: Multi-select on leads list → assign agent, change status, export, tag.

items.title: Lead tags, labels, and priority scoring
items.notes: Curated or freeform tags (urgent, docs-incomplets, VIP). Optional score from amount + profile + compte titres.

items.title: Duplicate lead detection and merge
items.notes: Same phone/email across submissions → flag or merge, keep history.

items.title: Saved lead views / presets
items.notes: Presets e.g. Nouveaux WhatsApp, Institutionnels >10M, Sans agent, Fenêtre clôture.

items.title: Pipeline board (Kanban) by status
items.notes: Optional board view for morning standups; list remains primary.

items.title: Click-to-contact from preferred channel
items.notes: Done 2026-07-14 — WhatsApp / tel / mailto links in lead detail panel. Touch event logging still open.

items.title: Round-robin / auto-assignment
items.notes: Auto-assign new leads across campaign agents when unassigned.

items.title: Role-based lead access
items.notes: Agents see own leads; admins see all; optional read-only managers. Depends on user-provisioning.

items.title: Lead activity / audit trail
items.notes: Who changed status/assignee/notes and when — coaching + compliance.

items.title: Funnel × leads reporting join
items.notes: Source → form start → complete → lead → souscrit. Ties analytics-dashboard to pipeline.

items.title: Smart routing by profile / amount / channel
items.notes: Institutionnel → senior; WhatsApp pref → WA-capable agent; amount >10M → VIP queue.

items.title: Follow-up reminders and tasks
items.notes: Due dates, overdue badges, optional calendar/ICS.

items.title: Daily lead reporting digest
items.notes: New leads, conversion by agent/source/amount; export for ops / CREPMF-style reporting.

items.title: Phone/email normalization and DQ flags
items.notes: E.164 phones, email validation, incomplete-dossier flags.

items.title: Rate limiter bucket memory leak
items.notes: Expired buckets never evicted from Map; grows unboundedly per-IP-per-form.

items.title: Client-side format validation per page
items.notes: validateCurrentPage only checks required; email/date errors surface on final submit.

items.title: GDPR/consent, retention, export/delete
items.notes: Public consent checkbox intentionally omitted from IPO form. Still need retention policy + subject export/delete by email. See docs/admin-leads-roadmap.md § Tier 4.
